title: Senior Teacher - Narayana Group - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Narayana Group - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Narayana Group family as a Senior Teacher in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Narayana Group:
Narayana Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
